commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional `resumable` flag to gateway and agent-facing session rows, passes it through `sessions_list`, and updates prompt/tool wording to clarify terminal-looking statuses are last-turn state.

PR surface: Source +20, Tests +1. Total +21 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current `sessions_list` exposes terminal-looking `status` values without resumability context, while `sessions.send` can reactivate ended subagent sessions through the existing reactivation path.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor or maintainer real behavior proof, not a safe automated code repair lane.

target.title: fix: add resumable field to prevent duplicate session spawns
target.body:
## Problem

Session `status` field values (`done`, `failed`, `timeout`, `killed`) mislead agents into treating sessions as permanently terminated, causing duplicate `sessions_spawn` calls instead of resuming existing sessions via `sessions_send`.

Closes #64103

## Root Cause

The `status` field reflects **last-turn communication state**, not session lifecycle state. However, nothing in the data model or tool descriptions makes this distinction explicit — so LLM agents interpret `failed`/`timeout`/`done` as terminal and spawn new sessions.

`reactivateCompletedSubagentSession()` in `session-subagent-reactivation.ts` confirms that sessions in these states **are** resumable via `sessions_send`.

## Solution (Incremental, backward-compatible)

Following [ClawSweeper's review](https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/64103#issuecomment-*) recommendation of additive metadata over breaking rename:

1. **Add `resumable?: boolean` field** to `GatewaySessionRow` and `SessionListRow` — non-running sessions set `resumable: true`
2. **Compute in `buildGatewaySessionRow()`** — `resolvedStatus !== "running"` → `resumable: true`; running sessions omit it
3. **Pass through in `sessions-list-tool`** — agent sees `resumable` in output
4. **Update tool description** — `describeSessionsListTool()` now explains status semantics
5. **Update system prompt** — `sessions_list` summary clarifies status is last-turn only, prefer `sessions_send`

## Changed Files

| File | Change |
|---|---|
| `src/gateway/session-utils.types.ts` | Add `resumable?: boolean` to `GatewaySessionRow` |
| `src/agents/tools/sessions-helpers.ts` | Add `resumable?: boolean` to `SessionListRow` |
| `src/gateway/session-utils.ts` | Compute `resolvedStatus` + `resolvedResumable` in `buildGatewaySessionRow()` |
| `src/agents/tools/sessions-list-tool.ts` | Pass `resumable` through to agent output |
| `src/agents/tool-description-presets.ts` | Add status semantics note to `describeSessionsListTool()` |
| `src/agents/system-prompt.ts` | Add status guidance to `sessions_list` tool summary |
| `src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts` | Add `resumable: undefined` to test expectation |

## Test Results

```
12 test files passed, 194 tests passed
oxfmt format check: all passed
```
